name: Ruby Dispute Vault Pass
description:
A holder pass from Royal Ruby. Each Pass unlocks the Ruby Dispute Vault — twelve battle-tested dispute letter templates, the FCRA § 611 method-of-verification playbook, and the certified-mail walkthrough Dr. Herman Marigny III has used with his community to remove collections, charge-offs, and old judgments. Holders also get auto-enrollment in the Diamond/Kava rewards club, future airdrops, and access to cohort sessions.

Educational content. Not legal or financial advice.
